nodes.name: Workflow Input Trigger
nodes.notes:
Receives the input payload from the Ingest workflow via Execute Workflow.

Expected input fields:
  - content (string)     — full extracted and normalised document text
  - document_id (string) — UUID from the documents table; used to tag
    every chunk in metadata so stale chunks can be deleted before re-ingestion.

This node is never triggered manually or by a webhook.
It is always called by the "Chunk and Embed Document" Execute Workflow node
in the Ingest workflow (dzxVlm0ygn25EVFz).

nodes.name: Store Documents to Supabase
nodes.notes:
LangChain vector store node in INSERT mode.
Orchestrates the full chunking → embedding → storage pipeline.

Sub-nodes connected:
  - Embed Documents to Supabase (ai_embedding) — converts each chunk to a 1536-dim vector
  - Default Data Loader (ai_document) — loads the document text and attaches metadata
    └── Recursive Character Text Splitter (ai_textSplitter) — splits before loading

Writes to: document_chunks table in Supabase.
Each inserted row contains: content, embedding (vector), metadata (includes document_id).

Table: document_chunks
RPC function used for retrieval: match_documents
Credential: Supabase account (supabaseApi)

nodes.name: Embed Documents to Supabase
nodes.notes:
OpenAI text-embedding-3-small model (1536 dimensions).
Connected as ai_embedding sub-node to Store Documents to Supabase.

Converts each text chunk into a dense vector for cosine similarity search.

IMPORTANT: must use the same model as the Chat Interface "OpenAI Embeddings" node.
If this model is ever changed, all existing embeddings are invalidated and every
document must be re-ingested to regenerate compatible vectors.

Credential: OpenAI account (openAiApi)

nodes.name: Default Data Loader
nodes.notes:
Reads $json.content as the source document text (dataType: jsonData).
Connected as ai_document sub-node to Store Documents to Supabase.

Metadata: attaches document_id from $json.document_id to every chunk.

Why this matters: the Delete Existing Chunks step in the Ingest workflow
uses a PostgREST JSONB filter (metadata->>document_id=eq.{UUID}) to remove
stale chunks before re-embedding. The document_id FK column is NOT used by
LangChain — only the metadata JSONB field is reliably populated.

Without this metadata, delete-before-update would not work and re-ingesting
a document would produce duplicate chunks in search results.

nodes.name: Recursive Character Text Splitter
nodes.notes:
Splits the full document text into overlapping chunks before embedding.
Connected as ai_textSplitter sub-node to Default Data Loader.

Settings:
  - chunkSize: 500 characters — balances retrieval precision vs. context richness.
    Smaller = more precise hits; larger = more context per retrieved chunk.
  - chunkOverlap: 100 characters — prevents context loss at chunk boundaries.
    Ensures sentences or ideas split across a boundary appear in both adjacent chunks.

Split strategy: tries paragraph → sentence → word boundaries before hard-splitting.
This preserves semantic coherence better than a fixed-character split.

Tune chunkSize up (700-1000) for long-form documents; down (200-300) for
structured data like FAQs where precise retrieval of short answers is needed.

parameters.content:
## [SUB] Chunk and Embed Document

**PURPOSE:**
Called by the Ingest workflow to split a document's full text into overlapping
chunks and store each chunk as a vector embedding in Supabase.
Enables semantic (RAG) search over document content in the Chat Interface.

**TRIGGER:**
Sub-workflow call from "Chunk and Embed Document" (Execute Workflow node)
in Chat RAG - Ingest Google Drive - v1. Never triggered directly.

**INPUT (from parent workflow):**
  - content (string)     — full extracted and normalised document text
  - document_id (string) — UUID from the documents table

**OUTPUT / RESULT:**
New rows inserted into document_chunks in Supabase:
  - content   — individual chunk text (500 chars, 100 overlap)
  - embedding — 1536-dim vector (text-embedding-3-small)
  - metadata  — { "document_id": "<uuid>" }  ← used for delete-before-update

**CREDENTIALS REQUIRED:**
  - Store Documents to Supabase → Supabase account (supabaseApi)
  - Embed Documents to Supabase → OpenAI account (openAiApi)

**CONNECTED WORKFLOWS:**
  - Called by: Chat RAG - Ingest Google Drive - v1 (dzxVlm0ygn25EVFz)
